text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Do people often come to open-air<n>cafes like this?
I'm afraid I don't eat<n>out much unless
someone's invited<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I usually eat at the cafeteria because<n>I'm so
busy. The food isn't bad,<n>actually.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Still, what an awful lot of students<n>here. This
must be a trendy spot.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The menu has nutritional<n>options
specifically for Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "Extra-Large<n>Stamina-Building Honey
Milk"...<n>"Umastagram-Worthy Jelly Soda"?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? I strictly monitor the<n>caloric intake of
my runners, but...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Just one should be fine. Let's have a<n>look at the
menu.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This may lead to a good opportunity<n>to boost
team morale.
choice_data_list: I'm sure they'll love whatever you get them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes... but we must be mindful not to<n>let them
become complacent.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy some drinks as we chat<n>away about
our runners.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. So sometimes<n>what burdens
them more isn't<n>pressure from their peers, but
rather—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's time to go. We have a meeting<n>in the
afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I just need to order some drinks to<n>go... Which
do you think is better?
choice_data_list: Go for the Extra-Large Honey Milk!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The honey milk? Little Cocon and<n>Bitter Glasse
should almost be done<n>with the training regimen I
set out, so<n>that would be perfect.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I'm sure Bitter Glasse will be<n>particularly
thrilled to get such a giant<n>drink.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You should see her eyes light up with<n>competitive
fire whenever she catches<n>sight of absurdly
oversized things.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be surprised if she tried to<n>drink the
entire thing in one go. I'll<n>have to keep an eye on
her...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Thank you for inviting me out today,<n><username>.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I... I've got some nice gifts now.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have trouble carrying<n>the
enormous drinks by herself, so I<n>give her a hand
as we return to the<n>academy.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Yes, it's so visually pleasing, it<n>might do
well to lift their mood.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we get to choose the color of the<n>jelly? Little
Cocon would like...<n>something dark, I'd imagine.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Her taste in things can be a bit<n>unconventional,
and she's picky<n>about how things look.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I don't keep up with the newest<n>trends, so this is
not my forte...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Could you help me pick something?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate it. Let me buy something<n>for your
trainee as thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We take our time selecting the jelly<n>colors for the
drinks to make them as<n>aesthetically pleasing as
possible.
